subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Jináb-i-Ghulám-Ḥusayn hath loosed his tongue in praise of you, offering words of glorification and praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء جناب غلامحسین زبان بستایش شما گشوده و حمد و ثنا گفته که
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the state of prayer; dynamics of prayer
